SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Interface IRiskScore.IDeduction

All Known Implementing Classes:
RiskScore.Deduction
Enclosing interface:
IRiskScore
public static interface IRiskScore.IDeduction
Individual deduction within a category.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    IRiskScore.IDeduction.IScope
    Scope metadata for a deduction, describing the protocol layer, affected TLS versions, and specific mechanism being checked.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getDescription()
    Human-readable description of the finding.
    String
    getRuleId()
    Stable rule identifier (e.g., "SYS-0000100").
    default IRiskScore.IDeduction.IScope
    getScope()
    Structured scope metadata indicating which protocol layer, TLS versions, and specific mechanism this deduction applies to.
    double
    getScore()
    Normalized rule score (0.0-1.0).
    String
    getSeverity()
    Severity derived from the rule score via severity_mapping.
    default boolean
    isInconclusive()
    Whether this deduction is inconclusive (data was unavailable to confirm the finding).

  • Method Details

    • getRuleId

      String getRuleId()
      Stable rule identifier (e.g., "SYS-0000100").
      Returns:
      Rule ID string

    • getDescription

      String getDescription()
      Human-readable description of the finding.
      Returns:
      Description string

    • getScore

      double getScore()
      Normalized rule score (0.0-1.0).

    • getSeverity

      String getSeverity()
      Severity derived from the rule score via severity_mapping.

    • isInconclusive

      default boolean isInconclusive()
      Whether this deduction is inconclusive (data was unavailable to confirm the finding). Inconclusive deductions still count toward the score but callers can distinguish verified findings from unverified ones.
      Returns:
      true if the finding could not be conclusively verified

    • getScope

      default IRiskScore.IDeduction.IScope getScope()
      Structured scope metadata indicating which protocol layer, TLS versions, and specific mechanism this deduction applies to. Returns null when the rule does not define a scope.
      Returns:
      Scope metadata, or null
